customManagers.description: Update Makefile tool versions via inline renovate comments
Update shell-script and cloud-init tool versions via inline renovate comments
matchStrings: # renovate: datasource=(?<datasource>\S+) depName=(?<depName>[A-Za-z0-9_./:-]+)( extractVersion=(?<extractVersion>\S+))?( registryUrl=(?<registryUrl>\S+))?( versioning=(?<versioning>\S+))?\s*\n[ \t]*[A-Z_]+=(?<currentValue>\S+)

packageRules.description: Wait 3 days before automerging major updates
Group GitHub Actions into one PR

Keep workload image bumps in sync across k8s/*.yaml and scripts/*.sh — YAML image: field (kubernetes manager) and matching scripts' IMAGE= variable (custom.regex on shell) land in one PR so `kind load docker-image` and `kubectl apply` can't disagree on the tag.
Keep kubectl in sync across .mise.toml (mise manager) and Makefile KUBECTL_VERSION (custom.regex, used as a Dockerfile --build-arg).
Keep kind in sync across .mise.toml (mise manager) and vm/cloud-init.yaml (custom.regex) — both pin kubernetes-sigs/kind; a split bump would produce two PRs referencing the same tool.
